name: enzyme_immobilization_no_answer_intent_v1
description: No-answer, social intent, out-of-domain, and prompt-injection benchmark. Full v1 cases include regression tests from the 2026-05-26 functional test report.

cases.construction_note: Observed bug: random letters retrieved unrelated CRL/MNP@ZIF-8 evidence and final candidate.
Observed bug: unknown/no-intent input retrieved acknowledgement chunks.
Observed bug: stream greeting looked fine but final JSON still had an adsorption candidate.
Identity/social question should not enter RAG recommendation ranking.
Observed bug: stream said evidence insufficient while final JSON generated a candidate.

cases.query: 青霉素发酵罐怎么灭菌
cases.application_context: 青霉素发酵罐怎么灭菌
cases.construction_note: Out-of-domain fermentation sterilization question should be rejected or clarified.
